Subject: eBiz: After the Tragedy
Message:
This issue of eBiz  is dedicated to Enron's response to the tragedy and how it affected our businesses and our people.

It's all in the latest eBiz http://home.enron.com/pubs/ebiz/issues/092401.  Or go to home.enron.com (http://home.enron.com ), click Publications, then click eBiz, and "eBiz September 24, 2001."
